**Note:** ApiaryLens is currently a foundation-only scaffold with no application
code. If this bug is about the repo structure or foundation files rather than an
app, say so — it helps triage.

A clear description of what's wrong.

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

- Browser (if PWA-related):

Logs, screenshots, anything else relevant.
